definition.box_rule: BoxHeight(A_ext,h) is accepted exactly when min(A_ext h)>0
definition.gordan_alternative: exactly one: exists h with A_ext h > 0, or exists nonzero y>=0 with A_ext^T y=0
definition.height_coherence: one global height h makes every local exterior inequality strictly positive
definition.obstruction: a nonzero y>=0 with A_ext^T y=0 is a positive circular obstruction
